name: @strav-tests/m7-social
description: M7 end-to-end smoke for @strav/social — boots Application + DatabaseProvider + EncryptionProvider + SocialProvider, runs applySocialAccountMigration against real Postgres, drives the full Line authorize → exchange → profile → SocialAccountRepository.connect → findByProviderIdentity loop with a stubbed Line OAuth backend. Encrypted token round-trip + cross-user link guard verified end-to-end. Self-skips when no Postgres is available.
